title: Rebuild envelope + letter UI to match provided HTML design

requirements.text: Replace the current SealButton/LetterContainer/LetterContent reveal flow with an animated envelope component that matches the provided HTML design: a burgundy (#800020) envelope with a triangular flap (::before pseudo-element), two-tone side/bottom panels (::after), and a circular wax seal centered on the envelope body displaying a gold heart (♥). Clicking the envelope toggles an 'open' state that flips the flap via rotateX(180deg), hides the wax seal, and animates the letter rising out of the envelope.

quotes: .envelope-wrapper.open .letter { bottom: 100px; height: 450px; width: 350px; opacity: 1; z-index: 5; transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(-50px); }

acceptanceCriteria: A burgundy envelope (300×200px) with a darker triangular top flap and two-tone lower panels is visible on page load.
A circular crimson wax seal with a gold heart is centered on the envelope.
Clicking the envelope flips the top flap upward (rotateX 180deg) and fades out the wax seal.
The letter panel animates upward out of the envelope, reaching 350×450px at opacity 1.
Clicking again (or a close action) reverses the animation back to the closed state.

requirements.text: Style the revealed letter panel using the provided design: parchment background (#fdf5e6), 1px border (#e0d0b0), padding 30px, scrollable overflow-y, with letter content using Playfair Display serif at 16px line-height 1.6. The letter header uses Dancing Script 28px in burgundy (#800020) with a gold (#d4af37) bottom border. The letter body text is dark (#333), justified, with a 20px bottom margin.

quotes: .letter { background: var(--parchment); padding: 30px; border: 1px solid #e0d0b0; overflow-y: auto; }
.letter-header { font-family: 'Dancing Script', cursive; font-size: 28px; color: var(--primary-red); border-bottom: 1px solid var(--gold); }

acceptanceCriteria: Letter panel has parchment (#fdf5e6) background and 1px solid #e0d0b0 border.
Letter header is rendered in Dancing Script 28px burgundy with a gold underline.
Body text uses Playfair Display 16px, dark color #333, justified alignment.
Letter panel is scrollable when content overflows.

requirements.text: Update the page background to a dark radial gradient (radial-gradient(circle, #1a1a1a 0%, #000 100%)) to match the provided design, replacing the current muted romantic gradient. Retain the existing StarBackground animated particle layer above the background.
acceptanceCriteria: Page background is a dark radial gradient from #1a1a1a center to #000 edges.
StarBackground sparkle/heart particles remain visible above the background.
No muted dusty rose or burgundy background tones remain.

requirements.text: Load Google Fonts for Dancing Script (weight 600), Playfair Display (regular 400, bold 700, italic 400), and Poppins (weight 300) via the index.html <head>, in addition to any existing font imports.
acceptanceCriteria: Dancing Script, Playfair Display, and Poppins are loaded from Google Fonts in index.html.
Fonts render correctly in the envelope and letter UI.

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui.
Preserve the existing StarBackground component and its animation logic.
All CSS variables (--primary-red, --gold, --parchment) must use the values defined in the provided HTML: #800020, #d4af37, #fdf5e6.
nonGoals: Adding background music or audio controls.
Backend data persistence or API integration.
